_provenance.curated_subset: 16 palettes — curated, not the full 161-palette catalogue
_provenance.note: Every palette carries an accessibility note. Adapted palettes come from ui-ux-pro-max colors.csv, whose accents are WCAG-adjusted in the source (noted per entry).

items.name: Swiss Red
items.accessibility: Text #111 on #FFF ~18:1 (AAA). Red accent passes 3:1 for large text/UI; use dark text on red fills.

items.name: Ink & Indigo
items.accessibility: Body text passes AAA on the light background; blue accent for large text/buttons (use white text on the accent).

items.name: Forest & Sand
items.accessibility: Deep green text is AAA on white; amber accent passes for large text only — pair with dark text.

items.name: Monochrome Pro
items.accessibility: All-neutral and high-contrast; the #888 accent is borderline for small text — reserve it for large/secondary elements.

items.name: Slate & Amber
items.accessibility: Slate text passes AAA; amber accent is large-text/UI only and needs dark text on top.

items.name: Oxford & Teal
items.accessibility: Navy text is AAA on white; teal accent passes 3:1 for large text — use white text on teal fills.

items.name: Plum & Lime
items.accessibility: Plum text is AAA; the lime accent fails for text — use it only as a fill/shape with dark text on top.

items.name: Crimson Editorial
items.accessibility: Near-black text is AAA; crimson accent passes 3:1 for large text and works with white text on fills.

items.name: Nordic Cool
items.accessibility: Slate text passes AAA on the cool background; sage accent is decorative/large-element only, not for text.

items.name: Electric Mono
items.accessibility: Near-black text is AAA; bright cyan is large-text/UI only — never small body text, and use dark text on cyan fills.

items.name: Graphite & Mint
items.accessibility: Graphite text is AAA; mint accent passes 3:1 for large text/UI — pair with dark text on fills.

items.name: Trust SaaS (Blue/Orange)
items.accessibility: ui-ux-pro-max: accent adjusted from #F97316 to #EA580C for WCAG 3:1; use white text on both blue and orange fills.

items.name: Calm Healthcare (Cyan/Green)
items.accessibility: ui-ux-pro-max WCAG-tuned: deep cyan/teal text passes on the pale background; use white text on the green accent.

items.name: Premium Dark + Gold
items.accessibility: ui-ux-pro-max: gold accent adjusted from #CA8A04 to #A16207 for WCAG 3:1; near-black text is AAA on the warm off-white.

items.name: Analytics (Navy/Amber)
items.accessibility: ui-ux-pro-max: amber adjusted from #F59E0B to #D97706 for WCAG 3:1; navy text is AAA on the light background.

items.name: Portfolio Mono + Blue
items.accessibility: ui-ux-pro-max WCAG-tuned: near-black text is AAA; blue accent passes for large text/UI with white text on fills.
